# Mark Siazon

> Product designer, full-stack developer, product engineer, UI/UX designer, and front-end specialist. Builds case-study-backed work across AI, mobile, Web3, and client web - portfolio at marksiazon.dev, GitHub profile @Iron-Mark.

Last updated: 2026-07-22

Mark Siazon ships end-to-end: research and UX flows -> design systems -> React/Next.js/Flutter/Kotlin -> APIs and Web3 proofs -> deployment and verification. Based in the Philippines. Open to product design, full-stack, AI workflow, mobile, and Web3 proof work.

Structured mirrors: [llms-index.json](llms-index.json) (structured index), [llms-ctx-full.txt](public/llms-ctx-full.txt) (expanded context), [FAQ.md](public/FAQ.md) (Q&A), [llms-index.schema.json](public/schema/llms-index.schema.json) (contract), [person.jsonld](public/schema/person.jsonld) and [faq.jsonld](public/schema/faq.jsonld) (Schema.org).

## Canonical sources

- [Portfolio (primary)](https://www.marksiazon.dev): canonical site and case studies
- [Person entity @id](https://www.marksiazon.dev/#person): Schema.org identity anchor
- [GitHub profile README](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark): this repo, README and activity widgets
- [GitHub account](https://github.com/Iron-Mark): primary account
- [Secondary GitHub](https://github.com/mark-siazon): alternate account
- [Full LLM context (repo)](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/llms-full.txt): full narrative profile
- [Structured entity index (JSON)](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/llms-index.json): machine-readable master data
- [Full LLM context (portfolio)](https://www.marksiazon.dev/llms-full.txt): narrative profile on the canonical site

## Availability

- [Recruiter brief](https://www.marksiazon.dev/recruiter): roles, engagement, and start-here proofs
- [Contact form](https://www.marksiazon.dev/contact): direct contact for hiring

Open to product design, full-stack engineering, AI workflow prototypes, mobile/Wear OS UX, and Web3 proof systems - contract, part-time, or full-time, Philippines and remote.

## Hire and contact

- [Recruiter brief (repo)](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/RECRUITER.md): 60-second recruiter screen

## Portfolio routes

- [Projects hub](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects): all case studies
- [Achievements](https://www.marksiazon.dev/achievements): awards and competition results
- [Writing](https://www.marksiazon.dev/writing): technical articles
- [Lab experiments](https://www.marksiazon.dev/lab): hackathon and prototype work

## Featured work (case studies)

- [HireProof](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/hireproof): AI trust and safety for job seekers - live at https://hireproof.tech/portfolio
- [Stellaroid Earn](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/stellaroid-earn): Web3 credential proof on Stellar
- [ResQLink](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/resqlink): offline-first emergency response platform
- [LexInsights](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/lexinsights): AI legal compliance chat - live at https://lexiph.vercel.app
- [Good To Live](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/good-to-live): client podcast web launch and feed setup
- [FlowFit](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/flowfit): Wear OS health and sensor companion
- [PalengkePay](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/palengkepay): Stellar fintech PWA for wet markets
- [GawainYah](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/gawainyah): MiniPay AI utility with payment guardrails
- [BaybayInscribe](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/baybayinscribe): Baybayin ML and cultural education UX - model at https://huggingface.co/gilas/baybayinscribe

## Hackathon and lab (GitHub profile)

- [qwen-ui-lab](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/qwen-ui-lab): AI-assisted UI scaffolding (Qwen3-VL, React, Tailwind, Next.js) - repo https://github.com/Iron-Mark/qwen-ui-lab, live https://qwen-ui-lab.vercel.app
- [Smart Profile](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Hackathon-Smart-Profile-Management-System): AI credentials SaaS
- [Kudlit](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/kudlit): Flutter Baybayin learning, Android release - repo https://github.com/ACSADians/kudlit-app
- [Pulse](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/pulse): Wear OS, GPS, heart-rate telemetry

## Achievements (proof)

- [UMak InfotechOlympics 2025 Android Productivity Champion](https://www.marksiazon.dev/achievements): ResQLink (Team Lumiere)
- [InfotechOlympics 2024 Android App Development winner](https://www.marksiazon.dev/achievements): BaybayInscribe (Team GILAS Tech)
- [Stellar bootcamp Top 5 of 105 teams](https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/stellaroid-earn): Stellaroid Earn

## Tech stack

- [Full stack reference (STACK.md)](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/STACK.md): 113-tool reference grouped by domain

Core stack on the profile README (16 tools): Figma - React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS - Flutter, Kotlin - Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude - Stellar, Celo - Python, Supabase, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Docker. Domains in STACK.md: Web, Mobile, Backend, Web3, Deploy, Game Dev, UI/UX, Creative, AI, and AI-assisted development workflow.

## FAQ

- [FAQ.md](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/FAQ.md): 16 question/answer pairs for hiring, projects, stack, and citation
- [PROOF.md](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/PROOF.md): README claims mapped to verification URLs
- [HOW-TO-CITE.md](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/HOW-TO-CITE.md): citation guide for humans and AI

- [Design system switcher in Next.js](https://www.marksiazon.dev/writing/design-system-switcher): building a runtime theme switcher
- [Offline-first emergency UX (ResQLink)](https://www.marksiazon.dev/writing/offline-first-ux): designing for zero connectivity

## Topics

product design, UI/UX, full-stack development, front-end engineering, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Flutter, Kotlin, Wear OS, AI workflows, trust and safety, ML product UX, Web3, Stellar, Celo, Soroban, Supabase, hackathon builds, case study portfolio, Philippines developer, design systems, Figma, mobile apps, fintech PWA, cultural education technology, Baybayin, tech stack reference

## Optional

Deep source index and mirrors - safe to skip in short context.

### Repo source files

- [Structured entity index (JSON)](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/llms-index.json): machine-readable master data
- [LLM manifest](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/llms.txt): this file
- [Robots](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/robots.txt): crawler directives
- [Sitemap source](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/sitemap.xml): URL index
- [Humans](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/humans.txt): authorship and entity block

### public/ content

- [Full LLM context](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/llms-full.txt): full narrative
- [Expanded context](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/llms-ctx-full.txt): machine-expanded index
- [FAQ.md](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/FAQ.md): question and answer pairs
- [STACK.md](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/STACK.md): full tech stack reference
- [JSON Schema contract](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/schema/llms-index.schema.json): index schema
- [Schema.org Person graph](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/schema/person.jsonld): entity JSON-LD
- [Schema.org FAQ graph](https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Iron-Mark/blob/main/public/schema/faq.jsonld): FAQPage JSON-LD

- [Home](https://iron-mark.github.io/Iron-Mark/): rendered profile index

- [Structured entity index](https://iron-mark.github.io/Iron-Mark/llms-index.json): JSON on Pages
